title: Cody Rose Wallace - Foster Global
content:
Cody Rose Wallace is an attorney at Foster LLP in our Austin office. Her practice is focused primarily on global immigration.
Cody graduated from Thomas Jefferson School of Law and received her undergraduate degree from Southwestern University in Georgetown, TX. Cody started with Foster as a legal assistant and returned as a global case coordinator before assuming her current role as an associate attorney with the firm.
Cody is licensed to practice in the State of Texas and is a member of the American Immigration Lawyers Association  (AILA).
Why Did You Decide To Become An Immigration Attorney?
The immigration process is deeply personal to our clients and it is rewarding and deeply satisfying to be able to play a role in that process. – Cody Wallace
- December, 2021 – Co-presented on “Global Immigration: Impacts of the Pandemic on Global Relocation and Travel” in a Foster webinar.
